nasb.text: by the lot of their inheritance, as the Lord commanded through Moses, for the nine tribes and the half-tribe.

esv.text: Their inheritance was by lot, just as the Lord had commanded by the hand of Moses for the nine and one-half tribes.

cnv.text: 是照著耶和華藉著摩西所吩咐的，以抽籤的方法把產業分給九個半支派。

ccb.text: 是照耶和华给摩西的指示，用抽签的方式分给九个半支派的。
